summary: Trust Engine API + Frontend Integration testing complete. All 9 backend tests pass, all frontend features verified. GET /api/trust/{user_id} returns enforcement-adjusted trust score, decay rate, active risk signals. Profile page shows Trust Engine card with score (15.5), enforcement badge, decay info (5%/month), and 2 active signals (low_effort_content, community_monopoly). Feed shows reaction weight labels (+1/+2/+5) and trust score badges.
critical_code_review_comments: Trust Engine API correctly returns enforcement-adjusted trust_score via recalc_trust_signal()
Profile Trust Engine card displays all required info: large score, enforcement badge, decay rate/status, active signals with severity labels
Feed reaction buttons show weight labels (+1/+2/+5) as subtle overlay (rgba 0.15 opacity as designed)
Own action reaction buttons are correctly disabled with tooltip 'Cannot react to own action'
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test users with active risk signals
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trust Engine API fully working. User 05d47b99-88f1-44b3-a879-6c995634eaa0 (newuser) has trust_score=15.5 (enforcement-adjusted), decay_rate=0.05, 2 active signals (low_effort_content severity:low, community_monopoly severity:medium). Profile page Trust Engine card data-testids: profile-trust-engine, trust-engine-score, enforcement-badge, trust-decay-rate, trust-decay-status, trust-risk-signals, risk-signal-{type}. Feed reaction weight data-testids: weight-support-*, weight-useful-*, weight-verified-*.
